div.p: Circular instruction of December 2, 1948 to Diplomatic Officers, not printed, transmitted copy of a press release of November 29, 1948 containing an address delivered by Walter M. Chapman, Special Assistant to the Under Secretary of State, on United States policy with respect to the conservation of fisheries in the high seas; for an article by Mr. Chapman on this subject, see the Department of State Bulletin, January 16, 1949, p. 67.
